nasb.text: David became angry because of the Lord’s outburst against Uzzah, and that place is called Perez-uzzah to this day.

esv.text: And David was angry because the Lord had broken out against Uzzah. And that place is called Perez-uzzah to this day.

cnv.text: 大衛因為耶和華擊殺了烏撒，就很生氣，因此稱那地方為毘列斯．烏撒，直到今日。

ccb.text: 大卫因耶和华击杀乌撒而烦恼，就称那地方为毗列斯·乌撒，沿用至今。
